title: Visibility is stringly-typed; should be an enum
description: determine_visibility() in inbox.rs returns String, and the visibility field is compared as string literals ("public", "unlisted", "private", "direct") in at least 8 locations across inbox.rs, posting.rs, delivery.rs, and streaming.rs. What goes wrong: a typo (e.g. "pubilc") silently falls through to the default branch without a compile-time error, resulting in incorrect addressing or federation behavior. An enum with Display/FromStr implementations gives exhaustive match coverage and prevents impossible states.
close_reason: Deferred: large refactor touching 20+ sites, low risk since values are server-controlled
